title: Build failure due to rich text component library issue
symptom: Users encounter 'CODEBUILD_FAILED' errors when attempting to publish their apps. This issue arose suddenly, affecting previously successful builds.
not_this_if: Build failure is unrelated to the rich text component
root_cause: The library used for the rich text component had a version deleted, causing builds that rely on it to fail. The dynamic versioning may lead to regressions if new versions introduce bugs.
fix_steps: Wait for the WeWeb team to stabilize the library version
Monitor for updates regarding the rich text component
Consider using a static version if available
agent_instruction: Monitor the status of the rich text component and wait for updates from WeWeb.
